title: pinguicula alpina
intro: Pinguicula alpina, also known as the alpine butterwort, is a type of carnivorous plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pinguicula alpina include its ability to aid in the healing of minor cuts and scrapes, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Pinguicula alpina is often used in infusions, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various skin conditions.
